a.label: Channel barycentric coordinates R_c, R_s, R_int
a.standard_term: normalized (barycentric-style) ratios of channel curvatures to total curvature

b.label: Decorated sheet field H = K(sqrt(r_1),...,sqrt(r_s))
b.standard_term: multiquadratic Kummer extension of a base field K

evidence.label: Channel barycentric coordinates R_c,R_s,R_int
evidence.summary: When K_G\ne0, define the normalized channel barycentric coordinates R_c=\frac{\kappa_c}{K_G}, \qquad R_s=\frac{\kappa_s}{K_G}, \qquad R_{int}=\frac{\kappa_{int}}{K_G}.

evidence.label: Self-confinement
evidence.summary: **Self-confinement:** If rank(H_s) = r_s, then e_k(Ŝ_s) = 0 identically for all k > r_s.

evidence.label: Decorated sheet field H
evidence.summary:
Define the decorated sheet field

```text
H = K(sqrt(r_1),...,sqrt(r_s))                (1.2)
```
